abilities.name: Tranquil Flower

attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused and Poisoned.
attacks.name: Dangerous Toxwhip

attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has any damage counters on it, this attack does 100 more damage.
attacks.name: Brave Wing

attacks.effect: Discard 3 Energy from this Pokémon.
attacks.name: Explosive Vortex

abilities.effect: This Pokémon takes 30 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).
abilities.name: Solid Shell

attacks.effect: Discard up to 2 Basic {W} Energy cards from your hand. This attack does 140 damage for each card you discarded in this way.
attacks.name: Twin Cannons

attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.
attacks.name: Bind Down

attacks.effect: Your opponent discards 2 cards from their hand.
attacks.name: Menacing Fangs

attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.
attacks.name: Heat Wave

attacks.effect: If you have the same number of cards in your hand as your opponent, this attack does 140 more damage.
attacks.name: Mirrored Flames

abilities.effect: If this Pokémon has any Special Energy attached, it gets +100 HP.
abilities.name: Expanding Body

attacks.effect: If you played a Supporter card from your hand during this turn, this attack does 90 more damage.
attacks.name: Friend Tackle

attacks.effect: This attack does 30 more damage for each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.
attacks.name: Mind Jack

attacks.effect: This attack can be used even if this Pokémon is on the Bench.
attacks.name: Dimensional Hand

attacks.effect: During your next turn, attacks used by this Pokémon do 120 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).
attacks.name: Dynamic Roll

attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance.
attacks.name: Rock Blaster

attacks.effect: Draw 3 cards.
attacks.name: Triple Draw

attacks.effect: Flip 4 coins. This attack does 100 damage for each heads.
attacks.name: Incessant Punching

attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is Asleep, it is Knocked Out.
attacks.name: Heart-Stopping Kiss

attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.
attacks.name: Icy Wind

abilities.effect: If this Pokémon has any {L} Energy attached, it has no Retreat Cost.
abilities.name: Voltaic Float

attacks.effect: This attack also does 90 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon that has any damage counters on it. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
attacks.name: Multishot Lightning

abilities.effect: Once during your turn, you may draw cards until you have 3 cards in your hand.
abilities.name: Restart

attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Active Pokémon's attacks and use it as this attack.
attacks.name: Genome Hacking

cards.effect: Look at the top 8 cards of your deck. You may reveal any number of Pokémon you find there and put them into your hand. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.
cards.name: Bill's Transfer

cards.effect: Draw 2 cards. Look at your face-down Prize cards.
cards.name: Daisy's Help

cards.effect: Your opponent reveals their hand, and you put a Basic Pokémon you find there onto your opponent's Bench. If you put a Pokémon onto their Bench in this way, switch in that Pokémon to the Active Spot.
cards.name: Erika's Invitation

cards.effect: Put an Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon into their hand. If you do, attach an Energy card from your hand to your Active Pokémon.
cards.name: Giovanni's Charisma
